channel.title: Photos on agtonybarletta
channel.description: Recent content in Photos on agtonybarletta

item.title: Bike
item.description: Shot with: Canon EOS 1200D Canon EF-S 18-55mm f/3.5-5.6 IS II Parameters: ISO 800 50mm f/5.6 1/6 Edited with: RawTherapee Downloads: parameters.txt [original]({{ print $pathURL “hobbies/photos/” .Page.Params.imageName “/” .Page.Params.imageName “-original.CR2” }})
